description: Branch Detection + Git Worktree Support — detect real git branch via gix, handle worktree .git files, wire branch through serve flow, snapshot on branch switch

userStories.title: Add worktree detection to find_git_root and get_current_branch
userStories.description: As a developer, I need find_git_root to resolve worktree .git files to the main repo root, and a new get_current_branch helper using gix with HEAD file fallback.
acceptanceCriteria: find_git_root handles .git as directory (normal repo) — no regression
find_git_root handles .git as file with gitdir: prefix — resolves to main repo root
get_current_branch uses gix::discover + find_head, strips refs/heads/ prefix
get_current_branch falls back to reading HEAD file directly
get_current_branch returns commit hash for detached HEAD
Unit test: find_git_root_handles_worktree_gitfile
Unit test: find_git_root_handles_nested_worktree
Unit test: get_current_branch_from_git_repo
Unit test: get_current_branch_worktree
Unit test: get_current_branch_detached_head
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Wire detected branch into serve flow
userStories.description: As a developer, I need serve.rs to detect the real git branch and pass it through to the orchestrator, watcher, and scan state instead of using hardcoded or DB-stored values.
acceptanceCriteria: detect_branch function added to serve.rs using get_current_branch with 'main' fallback
run_serve calls detect_branch after resolving project_root
ProjectConnection uses detected branch instead of repo_info.branch
Watcher receives detected branch via start_watcher parameter
ScanState for auto-scan path uses detected branch
Existing DB path: banner still shows DB branch but operations use detected branch
All callers of scan_project and scan_project_with_progress pass branch_id parameter
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add branch snapshot on switch to new branch
userStories.description: As a user, when I switch branches, my previous branch data is preserved via snapshot and serve starts clean on the new branch.
acceptanceCriteria: AutoScan path: after scan, compare detected_branch with main_branch, create snapshot if different and main has data
ExistingDb path: detect branch, compare with DB current_branch, switch if different
ExistingDb path: if target branch has no data, create snapshot from source branch
switch_branch called to update metadata table current_branch
list_branches used to check if target branch already has data
Typecheck passes

userStories.title: Add worktree integration tests
userStories.description: As a developer, I need integration tests covering worktree auto-init, isolated conventions, and multiple worktrees sharing the same DB.
acceptanceCriteria: Integration test: worktree_auto_init — detects main repo DB, branch_id = feature/foo, incremental scan < 5s, MCP returns correct branch
Integration test: worktree_isolated_conventions — worktree convention does not leak to main branch
Integration test: multiple_worktrees_same_db — three serve instances use same DB with distinct branch context, no data corruption
Typecheck passes
Tests pass
